data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario regarding rate limiting on auth endpoints.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior related to rate limiting on auth endpoints. However, there is no direct evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or testing of this specific behavior. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any relevant API interactions or outcomes that confirm the expected behavior, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of rate limiting on auth endpoints being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the rate limiting behavior.
